text: What is in your control here, and what are you wasting energy on that isn't?
If today were your last, would you be content with how you spent it?
What thinking trap did you fall into today (all-or-nothing, catastrophizing, mind-reading)?
What would you tell a good friend who was in your exact situation today?
What did you do today purely because it mattered to you?
Where did you give your attention to a screen instead of a person?
What's a constraint that's actually making your work better?
What boundary do you need to set or protect right now?
What small win toward a bigger goal can you celebrate today?
What are you ready to let go of as you move into tomorrow?
